checklist: Include full YAML in artifact previews
Provide provenance/confidence schema or populated sample
Add JSON-pointer citations for evidence table
Add regression tests for hard_threshold and needs_review behavior
Ensure previews are not truncated for grader consumption
extra_model_fields.notes: Changes are additive and low-risk; main regression risk is accidental renaming or breaking of citation paths. Run local pointer-resolution checks after edits.

extra_model_fields.notes: Changes are additive and low-risk; main regression risk is accidental renaming or breaking of citation paths. Run local pointer-resolution checks after edits.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: artifact previews contain the complete tool_policy_regression.yaml text; verifier confirms tool_policy_regression_yaml_preview_available=true.
planned_changes.description: Embed the full tool_policy_regression.yaml file in the produced artifacts and ensure it is included among artifact previews supplied to the grader/verifier (not just trace metadata).

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: safety_memo.md contains schema + example OR produced packet includes provenance/confidence values; verifier confirms 'needs_review' cases are demonstrable.
planned_changes.description: Either (A) add provenance and confidence fields to the embedded packet records (and show a sample populated packet) or (B) document a minimal reproducible schema for those fields in safety_memo.md and include an example record with confidence computed and provenance pointers.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Every evidence table row contains a JSON Pointer or equivalent that resolves to the referenced input field; automated check resolves pointers successfully.
planned_changes.description: Replace or augment the human-readable citation strings in the evidence table with machine-evaluable citations (JSON Pointer paths or stable field paths). Ensure the YAML references the same citations.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: New regression tests are included in artifacts and can be executed by the test harness; test results demonstrate the expected pass/fail behavior.
planned_changes.description: Add an explicit regression test case (input file + expected outcome) that demonstrates the hard_threshold_record_count gating (e.g., zero-record packet should fail hard gate) and another case showing needs_review toggling via confidence/provenance.

planned_changes.acceptance_criteria: Verifier confirms YAML preview available and semantic grade increases to reflect complete previews; no new issues introduced.
planned_changes.description: Re-run the artifact generation pipeline to produce updated previews (non-truncated where necessary) and submit the revised attempt so graders/verifiers can re-evaluate semantic correctness.

raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Provide missing YAML preview for semantic verification and supply provenance/confidence schema and regression tests so the grader/verifier can validate executable logic end-to-end.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline submission meets the artifact-presence and deterministic-precheck criteria and correctly applies a 'needs_review' override for missing provenance/confidence. A small semantic deduction (10%) was applied because the tool_policy_regression.yaml content was not present in the artifact preview available to the grader and the embedded packet lacks provenance/confidence fields. Provide the missing YAML preview and explicit provenance/confidence schema and machine-evaluable citations to enable full semantic verification.
